arts.ttl: Five ruled out for Derby County against Sunderland
arts.sum: Callum Elder, David Ozoh, Liam Thompson, Jake Rooney and Tom Barkhuizen are all nursing injuries and here is when they're expected to be back as the Rams prepare for what should be a fascinating encounter against the Black Cats. Like Elder, Ozoh will be out until after the next international break after suffering a hamstring strain.

arts.ttl: Derby County will disagree with 'only just' verdict as Norwich City 'hullabaloo' rumbles on
arts.sum: Former top Premier League referee Dermot Gallagher said he felt for the referee's assistant over the controversy surrounding Norwich City's first goal against Derby County at the weekend. The ball was also out of play for Norwich's third goal when Derby should have been awarded a corner but instead play was allowed to continue and Sainz wrapped up his hat-trick.

arts.ttl: Corey Blackett-Taylor challenge set as Paul Warne ponders tempting Derby County move
arts.sum: Richie Barker says Corey Blackett-Taylor's goal against Norwich will give the winger a boost after admitting he has had a stop-start career at Derby County. "There's no getting away from it, but the squad's pretty strong at the minute, and he had to even bide his time to get back on the bench.

arts.ttl: Sunderland boss makes triple Derby County point amid 'weaknesses' comment
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Click this link to receive daily Derby County content and breaking news.

arts.ttl: Former Derby County ace ends two-year wait for transfer as deal branded a 'gamechanger'
arts.sum: Former Derby County ace Ravel Morrison has finally landed a new club after two years of waiting by signing for Dubai-based side Precision FC. A statement read: "We are beyond excited to welcome the incredible Ravel Morrison to Precision FC!

arts.ttl: Paul Warne resists temptation despite demand in Derby County v Sunderland predicted XI
arts.sum: Latest Derby County news from DerbyshireLive looks at the team that Warne could pick to face the Black Cats at the Stadium of Light tonight Derby County writer Leigh Curtis picks his starting XI to face the Black Cats and we also want your team selection for the clash.

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan takes 'preposterous' swipe after Derby County controversy
arts.sum: Simon Jordan is a staunch supporter of VAR's use in the entirety of the English Football League - even if funded by the Premier League - if it means preventing situations like those experienced by Derby County against Norwich City. Just one division higher in the Premier League, there would have been a different outcome as the top-flight's employment of video assistant referees (VAR) means these goals would likely have been reviewed and possibly ruled out upon review of replays.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne springs quartet of surprises as he names Derby County team to face Sunderland
arts.sum: Coming into the side are Marcus Harness, Nathaniel Phillips and Tawanda Chirewa who all make their first league starts of the season while Kane Wilson replaces Nyambe at right wingback. Derby: Zetterstrom, Wilson, Phillips, Nelson, Cashin, Osborn; Adams, Harness, Goudmijn, Chirewa, Yates

arts.ttl: Leigh Curtis's Derby County player ratings v Sunderland as trio struggle amid 'careless' mistake - Leigh Curtis
arts.sum: A set-piece then brought a chance when Curtis Nelson saw an effort cleared off the line while Eiran Cashin and Craig Forsyth also went close. A rocket from Jobe Bellingham and a strike from Wilson Isidor left Derby County still searching for their first away points in the Championship this season as Sunderland coasted to a 2-0 win at the Stadium of Light.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne pinpoints what wasn't 'very good' as Derby County wait goes on in Sunderland defeat
arts.sum: Paul Warne felt Sunderland's quality told as Derby County's search for their first points away from home in the Championship continued with defeat at the Stadium of Light, "Sunderland were better than us I think and obviously a 30-yard screamer that took the net off was disappointing.
